task_completion.description: Verify that the Week 4 Follow-up event and data were removed from Subject DM-103.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the OpenClinica Subject Matrix or event history for Subject 'DM-103' with the 'Week 4 Follow-up' event marked as removed, deleted, or a success message confirming its removal.

task_completion.description: Verify that the reason 'Entered on wrong subject' was provided during removal.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing a removal confirmation dialog, discrepancy note, or audit log where the text 'Entered on wrong subject' is explicitly typed as the reason for removing the event/data.

task_completion.description: Verify that a new Week 4 Follow-up event was scheduled for Subject DM-102 with the start date 2024-03-10.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the 'Schedule Event' screen or Subject Matrix for 'DM-102' with the 'Week 4 Follow-up' event scheduled and the Start Date explicitly set to '2024-03-10'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the recovered Vital Signs data was entered for Subject DM-102.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Vital Signs CRF data entry screen for Subject DM-102 showing the exact values entered: Systolic BP '142', Diastolic BP '88', Heart Rate '76', Body Temp '37.1', and Weight '84.5'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Vital Signs CRF for Subject DM-102 was marked as complete.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Subject Matrix or CRF status screen for DM-102 where the Vital Signs CRF for the Week 4 Follow-up event displays a 'Complete' status icon (typically a green checkmark or a status label indicating completion).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenClinica web GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the OpenClinica interface. The agent should not be using terminal commands (like psql) to directly manipulate the database.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered the clinical data into the actual CRF form.
integrity.visual_evidence: The clinical values (142, 88, 76, 37.1, 84.5) must be visible inside the input fields of the OpenClinica web form, not merely typed into a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) should not be open and used to alter the DOM to fake status icons or data values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Study: DM-TRIAL-2024. Source Subject: DM-103. Target Subject: DM-102. Target Event: Week 4 Follow-up. Target Date: 2024-03-10. Expected Vital Signs Values: Systolic BP 142.0, Diastolic BP 88.0, Heart Rate 76.0, Body Temp 37.1, Weight 84.5. Required removal reason: 'Entered on wrong subject'.
